story.headline: City Cruise Past Palace in Etihad Rout
story.body: Manchester City put on a dominant display at the Etihad Stadium, dispatching Crystal Palace 3-1 in a match that was never truly in doubt. Two first-half goals set the tone before a late third sealed a comfortable victory for the hosts.
story.suggested_image_query: Manchester City Crystal Palace Etihad match

story.headline: Emirates Thriller Ends All Square
story.body: A breathtaking London derby saw Arsenal and Chelsea share the spoils in a pulsating 2-2 draw at the Emirates. Chelsea twice came from behind to deny the Gunners all three points in a match full of drama and attacking intent.
story.suggested_image_query: Arsenal Chelsea Emirates Stadium London derby

issues: The story does not mention the match date.
Venue capacity context could add depth.

story.headline: Anfield Erupts as Reds Demolish Rivals
story.body: Liverpool delivered a masterclass at Anfield, humiliating Manchester United 4-0 in a performance that will live long in the memory. The Reds were relentless from the first whistle, tearing apart a shell-shocked United side.

issues: Story incorrectly implies this was a historic scoreline without evidence.
No mention of goalscorers despite source data availability.
Tone is excessively one-sided for a news report.
